rag_rules: Place input envelope assumptions in component type annex agree blocks using visible feature names and provided bounds.
Use boolean helper equations to encode range constraints for assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Assumptions should bound inputs using concrete thresholds from the requirement.
Guarantees must relate visible outputs to computed conditions using boolean expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'eq <name> : bool = ...' to define reusable boolean conditions within annex agree.
Wrap all AGREE content in 'annex agree {** ... **};' with double asterisks.
anti_patterns: Do not embed literal numeric values directly in guarantees without a named boolean helper.
Avoid referencing implementation-level assignments or non-visible identifiers in type-level annexes.
